Structural Analysis

Foundation settlement, framing failures, and load-bearing capacity investigations

sendSubmit an Assignment
2,500+
Cases Completed
48 Hours
Response Time
99%
Success Rate
Nationwide
Coverage Area

Overview

Trinity Engineering's structural analysis services provide in-depth forensic investigations into foundation settlement, framing failures, load-bearing capacity issues, and building envelope defects. Our licensed Professional Engineers utilize advanced diagnostic equipment, engineering principles, and forensic methodologies to determine the root cause of structural failures. We deliver clear, defensible reports suitable for insurance claims, litigation, and remediation planning.

Request This Servicearrow_forward

Report Types Available

Standard Report

Comprehensive forensic engineering report with site observations, analysis, and conclusions.

schedule5-7 Business Days

Expedited Report

Fast-tracked investigation and reporting for time-sensitive claims and litigation.

schedule48-72 Hours

Expert Witness Package

Detailed report with supporting calculations, exhibits, and expert testimony preparation.

scheduleCustom Timeline

Services & Solutions

Comprehensive capabilities delivered by licensed Professional Engineers

foundation

Foundation Settlement Analysis

Comprehensive investigation of differential settlement, expansive soils, consolidation, and structural impact assessment.

construction

Framing & Truss Failures

Forensic analysis of roof truss failures, wall framing defects, and structural member inadequacies.

compress

Load-Bearing Evaluation

Engineering analysis of structural capacity, overload conditions, and design deficiencies.

home_repair_service

Building Envelope

Investigation of water intrusion, thermal performance, and exterior envelope failures.

crisis_alert

Collapse Investigation

Emergency response and forensic analysis for partial or complete structural collapses.

ruler

Code Compliance Review

Assessment of structures against applicable building codes and engineering standards.

Perils Assessed

Our forensic engineers investigate a comprehensive range of failure mechanisms and causes

Our Investigation Process

A systematic approach to forensic engineering excellence

travel_explore
1

Site Investigation

Detailed on-site inspection with comprehensive documentation, measurements, and photographic evidence.

calculate
2

Forensic Analysis

Engineering calculations, load analysis, and forensic evaluation to determine root cause.

science
3

Testing & Diagnostics

Non-destructive testing, material sampling, and laboratory analysis when required.

description
4

Expert Reporting

Delivery of comprehensive, defensible engineering reports with findings and recommendations.
